data.title: Adelayde Exploration Forms Three-Way JV to Target Deep Lithium Brines in Nevada’s Clayton Valley
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Spearmint Resources Inc ( (TSE:ADDY) ) has shared an announcement.

Adelayde Exploration has entered into a three-way joint venture with Sienna Resources and Cruz Battery Metals to explore deep basin lithium brine potential across a 2,300-acre land package in Clayton Valley, Nevada, a key U.S. lithium-producing region that hosts Albemarle’s long-standing Silver Peak mine and is surrounded by major lithium deposits. By consolidating 115 mineral claims into a single centrally located block and sharing costs, liabilities and benefits equally, the partners aim to design and fund a drill program targeting the deepest parts of the basin, leveraging strong lithium prices and Adelayde’s solid financing to accelerate exploration and potentially strengthen their collective positioning in the U.S. lithium supply chain.

Spark’s Take on TSE:ADDY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:ADDY is a Underperform.

Spearmint Resources Inc. faces significant financial performance challenges, marked by zero revenue and persistent losses. Despite a strong equity position with no debt, declining assets and negative cash flow highlight potential liquidity issues. Technical indicators show stagnant momentum with neutral RSI and overbought Stochastic. Valuation is unattractive due to a negative P/E ratio and no dividend yield. However, the recent acquisition in the tungsten sector is a strategic positive, providing some potential for future growth.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:ADDY stock, click here.

More about Spearmint Resources Inc

Adelayde Exploration Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on lithium projects in Nevada, particularly in Clayton Valley, where it already holds the McGee lithium clay deposit with a significant indicated and inferred lithium carbonate equivalent resource. The company targets critical and strategic minerals and has recently aligned itself with U.S. national security interests by joining the National Defense Industrial Association to support advancement of its mineral portfolio.

Average Trading Volume: 111,938

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$7.08M

data.title: Satellos Consolidates Shares Ahead of Proposed Nasdaq Listing
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Satellos Bioscience ( (TSE:MSCL) ).

Satellos Bioscience has completed a one-for-12 consolidation of its common shares, reducing the number of outstanding shares from about 185.5 million to roughly 15.5 million, as part of its effort to meet the share price and other requirements for a proposed listing on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol “MSLE.” Management says the consolidation is aimed at boosting the company’s market visibility, liquidity and access to a broader investor base, while maintaining shareholders’ proportional ownership and voting power, and adjusting outstanding options and pre-funded warrants accordingly, a move that could strengthen Satellos’s capital markets profile as it advances its clinical-stage muscle disease pipeline.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:MSCL) stock is a Hold with a C$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Satellos Bioscience stock, see the TSE:MSCL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:MSCL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:MSCL is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (pre-revenue, large losses, and heavy cash burn with ongoing funding risk). Technicals are supportive due to a clear uptrend, but overbought signals temper that strength. Valuation is also constrained by negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:MSCL stock, click here.

More about Satellos Bioscience

Satellos Bioscience Inc. is a Toronto-based, clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing small-molecule therapies that restore natural muscle repair and regeneration in degenerative muscle diseases. Its lead candidate, SAT-3247, is an orally administered AAK1-targeting drug in clinical development as a potential disease-modifying treatment for Duchenne muscular dystrophy, supported by the company’s proprietary MyoReGenX discovery platform to expand into additional muscle diseases and injury indications.

Average Trading Volume: 257,230

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$231.9M

Learn more about MSCL stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Kenorland and Auranova Uncover New Gold-Bearing Corridor at South Uchi Project
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Kenorland Minerals ( (TSE:KLD) ) is now available.

Kenorland Minerals and Auranova Resources reported full assay results from their 2025 fall diamond drill program at the South Uchi Project in Ontario’s Red Lake District, where 13 holes totaling 7,075 metres expanded the Papaonga gold target and uncovered a previously unknown, gold-bearing structural corridor beneath glacial cover. The program delivered high-grade intercepts, including 5.42 g/t gold over 1.80 metres, and broad zones of gold anomalism that suggest district-scale potential across an emerging eight-kilometre strike length, prompting a follow-up drill campaign of up to 3,000 metres in early 2026 aimed at delineating higher-grade shoots and strengthening the project’s exploration upside and strategic significance within the belt.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:KLD) stock is a Hold with a C$3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kenorland Minerals stock, see the TSE:KLD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:KLD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:KLD is a Neutral.

Kenorland Minerals’ stock score is primarily impacted by its financial performance challenges, with persistent net losses and negative cash flows. Despite strong technical indicators suggesting bullish momentum, the overbought conditions could lead to a pullback. The negative P/E ratio and lack of dividend yield further weigh on the valuation, resulting in a moderate overall score.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:KLD stock, click here.

More about Kenorland Minerals

Kenorland Minerals Ltd. is a mineral exploration company focused on discovering gold and other precious metal deposits, with key projects in prolific Canadian mining districts such as the Red Lake District of Ontario. Working in partnership with companies like Auranova Resources Inc., it advances early-stage to drill-ready targets through systematic geophysical and geochemical exploration and diamond drilling to define district-scale mineralised systems.

Average Trading Volume: 36,674

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$271.6M

data.title: Medtecs Reshapes Board with New Independent Director and Committee Changes
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Medtecs International Corporation Ltd. ( (SG:546) ).

Medtecs International Corporation Limited has announced boardroom changes, appointing Wang Bo-Shing Jim as an independent director effective 12 February 2026. Wang will also serve as chairman of the remuneration committee and sit on both the audit and nominating committees, and is deemed independent under Singapore’s Catalist rules. The move coincides with the resignation of independent director Nieh Chien-Chung, who is stepping down from the board and relinquishing his roles on the same committees. Following these changes, Medtecs has reshaped its board and audit committee composition, signalling a continued emphasis on independent oversight and corporate governance in line with SGX requirements.

More about Medtecs International Corporation Ltd.

Medtecs International Corporation Limited is a Bermuda-incorporated company listed on the Singapore Exchange’s Catalist board. The company operates in the healthcare and medical supplies sector, with a focus that necessitates adherence to SGX corporate governance and board independence requirements.

Average Trading Volume: 1,090,007

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: S$65.57M

Affluent Foundation Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:1757) ) just unveiled an update.

Shareholders of Affluent Foundation Holdings Limited have overwhelmingly approved a proposal to change the company’s English name to “Global Chinese Business Club” and adopt a new Chinese name, with 100% of votes cast at an extraordinary general meeting in favour of the special resolution. data.title: Circio insiders back NOK 1.00 rights issue with substantial subscriptions
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Targovax ASA ( (GB:0RIS) ) has issued an announcement.

Circio Holding ASA has announced that key insiders have participated in its ongoing rights issue, reinforcing internal support for the company’s current capital-raising effort. Chief Scientific Officer Victor Levitsky has exercised 32,698 subscription rights and additionally subscribed for 217,302 offer shares without rights, for a total of 250,000 new shares at NOK 1.00 per share, while Sølen AS, a company closely associated with board member Thomas Falck, has exercised 65,164 subscription rights and subscribed for an additional 134,836 offer shares without rights, totaling 200,000 new shares on the same terms. Both parties will be allocated an equivalent number of warrants without extra consideration, subject to board approval and completion of the rights issue, signaling confidence from management and board-level stakeholders in the company’s financing plan and future prospects, and complying with mandatory insider trading disclosure rules under EU and Norwegian law.

More about Targovax ASA

Circio Holding ASA is a Norway-based listed company active in the biotechnology and life sciences sector, with its shares traded on the Oslo market. The company operates under Norwegian securities regulations, including the EU Market Abuse Regulation and the Norwegian Securities Trading Act, and is subject to related disclosure requirements regarding insider transactions and capital market activities.

data.title: Capstone Holding Highlights Monetization Strategy and Capital Priorities
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Capstone Holding ( (CAPS) ) has provided an announcement.

On January 28, 2026, Capstone Holding Corp. published an investor FAQ outlining how it is shifting from pure platform expansion to monetizing scale in the building products sector, emphasizing its technology and AI-enabled tools as core drivers of faster integration, margin expansion, and improved cash generation following recent acquisitions that added more than $25 million in 2025 revenue. Management detailed its focus on funding growth increasingly from operating cash flow and senior credit rather than equity issuance, managing its Instone revolving credit facility and 2026 debt maturities through cash generation and refinancing flexibility, and prioritizing long-term per-share value as it seeks to regain Nasdaq minimum bid compliance primarily through operational and earnings improvements, with a reverse split only as a contingency, while remaining disciplined on further accretive acquisitions and open to potential share buybacks as part of its capital allocation strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (CAPS) stock is a Hold with a $0.67 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Capstone Holding stock, see the CAPS Stock Forecast page.

Corporate events are mixed—growth via acquisitions and cost relief help, but the Nasdaq bid-price compliance issue adds meaningful downside risk; valuation provides limited support due to negative earnings and no dividend data.

To see Spark’s full report on CAPS stock, click here.

More about Capstone Holding

Capstone Holding Corp. operates in the building products sector, focusing on distributing and integrating building materials and related services across North America. data.title: Airtificial wins new automation contracts in Morocco, Thailand and Romania to boost global automotive reach
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Airtificial Intelligence Structures SA ( (ES:AI) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Airtificial Intelligence Structures SA has signed three new contracts in Morocco, Thailand and Romania as part of its strategy to diversify geographically and strengthen its international presence in key automotive markets. In Morocco, the company will deliver advanced automated lines and high‑performance steering components, including electric power steering and Steer‑by‑Wire systems, for next‑generation vehicle models serving major European‑American and Asian OEM groups. In Thailand, Airtificial will deploy a fully automated manufacturing system for a leading US‑based Tier‑1 supplier to create specialized leather‑like surface finishes for 23 types of car seats at high speed, while in Romania it will implement automation for airbag inflator production, reinforcing the company’s positioning in both active and passive vehicle safety technologies and deepening relationships with global automotive clients across multiple regions.

More about Airtificial Intelligence Structures SA

Airtificial Intelligence Structures SA is an engineering and technology company focused on industrial automation, particularly through its Intelligent Robots division, which designs, manufactures and implements smart production and assembly lines for Tier‑1 suppliers and global automotive manufacturers, with a growing international footprint in key cost‑competitive automotive hubs.

Average Trading Volume: 3,046,429

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €147M

data.title: World Nexus Moves to Take Control of Thelloy Development Group With Mandatory Cash Offer Triggered
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Thelloy Development Group Limited ( (HK:1546) ) has provided an announcement.

World Nexus Holdings Limited has entered into a conditional sale and purchase agreement to acquire 500,800,000 shares of Thelloy Development Group Limited, representing 62.6% of the company’s issued share capital, at a total consideration of HK$95.15 million, or HK$0.19 per share. Subject to completion of this controlling stake acquisition by 12 February 2026 or a later agreed date, World Nexus will be required under Hong Kong’s Takeovers Code to launch a mandatory unconditional cash offer for all remaining issued shares not already owned or agreed to be acquired by it and its concert parties, signalling a potential change of control and ownership structure for Thelloy and the resumption of trading in its shares.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1546) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.37 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Thelloy Development Group Limited stock, see the HK:1546 Stock Forecast page.

More about Thelloy Development Group Limited

Thelloy Development Group Limited is a Cayman Islands-incorporated company listed on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong, operating within the construction and development sector, though this announcement focuses on its shareholding and control structure rather than its specific operational activities or markets.

Average Trading Volume: 3,999,785

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$308M

data.title: Civista Bancshares Boosts Quarterly Dividend, Signals Confidence
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Civista Bancshares ( (CIVB) ) has shared an update.

On January 28, 2026, Civista Bancshares, Inc. announced that its board approved a quarterly common dividend of $0.18 per share, a one-cent, or 5.9%, increase from the prior quarter, to be paid on February 24, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 10, 2026. The higher dividend amounts to an estimated $3.7 million payout and, based on Civista’s December 31, 2025 closing share price of $22.22, equates to an annualized yield of 3.24%, underscoring the regional lender’s ongoing capital return to shareholders and signaling confidence in its financial position within the community banking sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (CIVB) stock is a Buy with a $28.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Civista Bancshares stock, see the CIVB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CIVB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CIVB is a Neutral.

Civista Bancshares’ overall stock score is driven by strong earnings performance and positive technical indicators. The company’s strategic merger and capital raising efforts bolster its growth prospects. However, concerns about revenue decline and potential overbought technical signals temper the score. The valuation suggests the stock may be undervalued, providing a potential opportunity for investors.

To see Spark’s full report on CIVB stock, click here.

More about Civista Bancshares

Civista Bancshares, Inc. is a $4.3 billion financial holding company headquartered in Sandusky, Ohio, whose primary subsidiary, Civista Bank, founded in 1884, offers full-service banking, commercial lending, mortgage, and wealth management services through 44 branches across Ohio, southeastern Indiana, and northern Kentucky, while its Civista Leasing & Finance division provides commercial equipment leasing to businesses nationwide; the company’s common shares trade on the NASDAQ Capital Market under the symbol CIVB.
